findings.location: translated/page_086.json — multiple blocks, zh choice labels
findings.jp_actual: ア/イ/ウ/エ used in JP (correct); ZH mixes 甲/乙/丙/丁 and A/B/C/D inconsistently across blocks on same page
findings.trace: JP stems and choices for all 6 questions match OCR verbatim. Answer indices verified: Q0→イ(1), Q1→ウ(2), Q2→エ(3), Q3→エ(3), Q4→エ(3), Q5→イ(1). No garbled chars, no answer-letter substitution in JP. ZH label inconsistency (甲/乙 vs A/B) is a translation formatting issue, not a JP OCR error.
findings.recommended_fix: Standardize ZH choice labels to A/B/C/D across all blocks.
